channels.name: WhatsApp
channels.why: Fast trust-building and low-friction replies for founder-led businesses.

channels.name: Instagram
channels.why: Useful when buyers need visible proof, short education, and social trust.

channels.name: Facebook
channels.why: Still relevant for local audiences, referrals, and social proof loops.

channels.name: Google Maps
channels.why: Captures local intent when buyers already know the category they need.

channels.name: Referrals
channels.why: Often the highest-trust path for small businesses in Mexico.

operating_realities: Many founders start with low marketing budgets.
Trust often matters more than polished branding.
WhatsApp can be a primary sales and support channel.
Clarity around invoicing and payment methods can affect conversion.
Local references and word of mouth can outperform paid channels early.
